data.title: Write polyglot reviewer compliance test (RED)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/docs/test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh with 4 test functions verifying the polyglot reviewer compliance contract:

1. test_generated_agents_contain_no_python_tool_names — Run build-review-agents.sh with --output to a temp directory. Grep all generated agent files for ruff|mypy|lint-ruff|lint-mypy in suppression/Do-Not sections. Assert zero matches.
2. test_generated_agents_contain_configured_linter_language — Grep generated agent files for 'configured linter' or 'configured lint'. Assert at least one match per file.
3. test_config_keys_preserved — Grep validate.sh for commands.lint_ruff and commands.lint_mypy. Assert both present.
4. test_source_templates_contain_no_python_tool_names — Grep reviewer-delta-*.md source files (Linter Suppression Rules sections only, using awk to scope) and reviewer-base.md (Do Not/suppression sections) for ruff|mypy. Assert zero matches.

IMPORTANT: Use --output to mktemp -d when running build-review-agents.sh — do NOT regenerate into the live agents/ directory. Tests must be side-effect-free.

Add comment in test header: 'This test invokes build-review-agents.sh to regenerate agents into a temp directory. If this test fails unexpectedly, check whether build-review-agents.sh interface has changed (flags, required env vars).'

This test FAILS (RED) on the current codebase because generated agents DO contain ruff/mypy terms.

## Files to Modify
- tests/docs/test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT — add RED markers and mappings for reviewer-base.md and reviewer-delta-light.md)

## TDD Requirement
Write test_generated_agents_contain_no_python_tool_names first. Run it against current codebase — must FAIL (exit non-zero) because current generated agents contain ruff/mypy terms.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file tests/docs/test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh
- [ ] Test contains at least 4 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Test FAILS (exit non-zero) on current codebase
  Verify: ! bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh
- [ ] .test-index maps reviewer-base.md to test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh
  Verify: grep 'reviewer-base.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance'
- [ ] .test-index maps reviewer-delta-light.md to test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh
  Verify: grep 'reviewer-delta-light.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance'
- [ ] .test-index contains RED markers [test_generated_agents_contain_no_python_tool_names] and [test_source_templates_contain_no_python_tool_names]
  Verify: grep -q '\[test_generated_agents_contain_no_python_tool_names\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
